description: CompositionDark chocolate brown slim Fit trousers made of 100% cotton, has flat front with two insert pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with buttoned closures, zipper fly and has loops on the waist to secure a beltFittingSlim fit, mid-low rise, straight legWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakRemove promptly and line dry inside out in shadeWarm iron only, but do not iron directly on print/embroideryUpgrade your sophisticated style with these dark chocolate brown slim fit trousers from basics. The pure cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day, while the classic cut of the trousers makes it perfect for casual and semi-formal wear. Team this with slim fit shirts and leather loafers for a well groomed look.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 44"Height: 6'3”, Waist: 32”
